summary:
The reviewed materials contain no discussion of machine learning, survival analysis, or methodological comparisons between machine learning and statistical approaches. Consequently, it is impossible to infer from this evidence that machine learning surpasses statistical methods in predicting patient outcomes.  

\boxed{B}
